prompt: I run Claude Opus 4.7 through every retail-inventory query at $20/day. Flash Lite would be $2/day. Can we safely distill the lookups?
notes: clear compile_down signal, bounded tool retrieval, no policy engine

prompt: Our support agent is a 400-line LangChain chain that uses GPT-4. We want a proper orchestrator-worker scaffold so it can escalate to humans and retry on tool failures.
notes: legacy chain, needs escalation + retry + state

prompt: I built an agent in LangGraph that works well. Can you show me what it looks like in the OpenAI Agents SDK so my team can move to that stack?
Generate a weekly financial summary from our revenue spreadsheet and email it to the finance team.
Build me an AI broker assistant that tracks listings across the MLS, applies brokerage pricing rules, logs every advice given, and escalates when offers exceed thresholds.
notes: policy + outcomes + audit => full world model + scaffold

prompt: Summarize each day's Slack threads into a digest.
We need an AI that can read a customer's ticket, decide whether to refund, apply the refund via Stripe, and log the reason in our billing system. Refunds over $500 require manager approval.
Extract named entities from contracts and put them in a CSV.
We have a Cursor workflow that the senior engineers use daily. Can you capture it and turn it into a cheaper automated pipeline for the junior engineers?
I want an agent that tries to solve arbitrary open-ended math word problems.
notes: unbounded reasoning, can't externalize to structure

prompt: Translate our legacy rule-based email classifier (no LLM) into an agent that uses Claude for edge cases.
notes: rules + fallback to LLM = tool-first chain

prompt: Build an assistant that reads our store's POS transactions in real time, flags anomalies, applies loss-prevention policies, and notifies managers. Must log every action for compliance.
I have a big Anthropic-SDK agent that costs a fortune. Can we replace it with a smaller model + a bunch of handlers that call the right tools?
Generate product descriptions given a SKU and its photos.
Port our in-house Python agent to AWS Bedrock.
notes: framework migration; complexity unknown so assume orchestrator default

prompt: We're getting sued because our agent hallucinated an SKU that didn't exist. We need every answer to cite a source from our product catalog.
notes: grounding + evidence graph = full world model

prompt: Our support bot is on GPT-3.5. We want to upgrade to GPT-4 or Claude but are worried about regressions on the 200 test cases we already have.
Give me a cool version of my simple summarizer as a full multi-agent system with a planner, researcher, and writer.
Agent that reads a GitHub PR and decides if it should be merged, blocked, or needs review. Must respect our CODEOWNERS file and branch protection rules.
I saw Claude Code and want to build our own small version in-house.
notes: coding agent = orchestrator; no existing solution

prompt: Detect sentiment in tweets about our brand.
I built something in n8n with a bunch of AI nodes. Can we make it a proper agent instead?
Price elasticity research across 40 SKUs every Monday morning.
Our lawyers want an agent to draft contract clauses. Every clause has to be matched against our boilerplate library, not generated from scratch, and we need an audit trail.
notes: retrieval + audit + policy = full world model

prompt: Convert this 80-line system prompt into an agent with proper tool calling.
I can describe the ideal retail-ops agent but I don't know if an LLM can even do this.
notes: user uncertain; need big model + more detail

prompt: Take the workflow I have in Claude Code (session export attached) and give me the same thing in Python with OpenAI.
Automate our Monday standup notes: scan Jira, Github, and Notion, produce a summary per engineer, email to the lead.
An agent that runs our inventory restock workflow: reads demand signals, applies supplier rules, files purchase orders, tracks delivery, and retries on supplier failures.
Classify incoming emails into 10 categories.
